> Daily capacity target is 400 drafts; this run scored 5. Targets describe capacity, not a count of verified companies (no purchased lists).

---

## 2. Scoring Thresholds

| Status | Score | Action |
|--------|-------|--------|
| top_priority | 85+ | Send first (after approval) |
| approval_queue | 75–84 | Founder approval queue |
| needs_rewrite | 65–74 | Rewrite, then re-score |
| rejected | < 65 | Do not send |

**Top Approval Queue** = Email Gate pass **AND** score ≥ 75 **AND** risk_level ≠ high.
